slides.title: Your liver is quietly *keeping score*.
slides.sub: Fatty liver builds for years without a symptom. A simple test can catch it while it is still reversible.

slides.title: Fat that hides in plain sight
slides.body: Non-alcoholic fatty liver disease affects roughly one in three adults. Most never feel it, because the liver *rarely complains* until late.

slides.title: A single blood marker
slides.body: ALT is a liver enzyme on most basic panels. A quietly rising level *can be an early sign* that fat is straining the liver.

slides.title: A look inside, no needle
slides.body: A quick abdominal ultrasound can see the fat directly. Together, ALT and imaging *help catch* trouble years before scarring.

slides.title: Early fat is reversible
slides.body: Caught early, shedding visceral fat *can reverse* much of the damage. Left alone, it may harden into permanent scarring.

slides.title: Less visceral fat, calmer liver
slides.body: Steady movement, fewer refined carbs and better sleep *are linked to* lower liver fat. Small daily habits move the marker most.

slides.title: Protect the organ that *does the work*.
slides.body: Vibe Health turns your food, movement, steps and sleep into one daily Health Score, so the habits that ease your liver are easy to keep.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
Fatty liver builds silently for years, but it is one of the most reversible things in your body if you catch it early. 🌿

A simple ALT blood marker and a quick ultrasound can flag it while shedding visceral fat can still undo the damage, before it hardens into scarring. Save this for your next checkup. 🔖

Vibe Health turns the daily habits that ease your liver into one simple score → link in bio.
youtube_title: The Quiet Liver Test That Can Catch Damage Early
